homepage.heroLine1: Build a superior context layer for
homepage.heroSubtitle: Empower your AI agents through the leading open-source RAG engine, delivering reliable context and an integrated agent platform, built for enterprise.
homepage.feature1Desc: Harness our built-in ingestion pipeline to cleanse and process multi-format data, structuring it into rich semantic representations for superior retrieval.
homepage.feature2Desc: Combine vector search, BM25, and custom scoring with advanced re-ranking to deliver unmatched answer accuracy and context relevance.
homepage.feature3Desc: Build powerful agents in an all-in-one platform, seamlessly integrating RAG, tools, and MCPs within visual workflows.
homepage.solution1Desc1: This workflow automates company data collection and consolidates financial metrics with research insights. Enables advanced stock analysis through autonomous planning and multi-agent orchestration.
homepage.solution1Desc2: It starts by identifying stock tickers from user queries, then aggregates insights from external authoritative sources and internal records. Ultimately, these qualitative insights are combined with financial metrics to yield a complete investment report.
homepage.solution2Desc1: This workflow provides structured precedent analysis by examining similar legal cases across public sources and internal datasets.
homepage.solution2Desc2: Upon case input, key attributes—such as jurisdiction and legal issues—are automatically extracted to formulate search queries and retrieve comparable precedents. The results are then consolidated into a structured analysis reflecting how similar cases were resolved.
homepage.solution3Desc1: This workflow provides structured maintenance guidance by accurately sourcing content from internal manuals, with external references used as supplementary support.
homepage.solution3Desc2: When a task is entered, the workflow first validates input sufficiency—ensuring essential details are present—then extracts standard protocols from internal maintenance manuals, integrates supplementary external technical data, and produces clear execution instructions.

financialServices.pageDescription: Advanced Stock Research - Tailor financial scenarios with multimodal data parsing and traceable techniques
financialServices.headerTitle: Convert diverse financial data into informed decisions
financialServices.headerSubtitle: Tailor financial scenarios with multimodal data parsing and traceable techniques to de-risk investments, streamline business operations and enhance your competitive position.
feature1Items: One-stop solution for cleansing and extracting multi-modal data including reports, contracts and recordings.
Automatically identify financial document layouts and generate traceable knowledge chunks.
feature2Items: Combine entity extraction with semantic and context-aware structures to locate and interpret regulations from massive reports, cases and contracts.
Every reply cites its sources, enabling one-click navigation to the original paragraph or clause.
feature3Items: Native integration with mainstream financial data sources to support research and decision-making.
Transparency in the Agent execution process from data retrieval to analysis conclusions builds trust in every reply.
feature4Items: Real-time document-level ACL enables fine-grained control, ensuring users' access to data is precisely scoped to their organizational permissions.
Implement fine-grained, multi-level isolation (tenant, department, role, and project levels) to enforce strict static and dynamic security boundaries.
financialServices.useCase1Description: Querying "analyze NVDA recent quarterly AI revenue" triggers retrieval from internal reports, external research, and raw data, ultimately generating an AI-generated quotable brief.
financialServices.useCase2Description: Real-time checking of sales talk tracks and product recommendations against regulations and institutional rules to reduce sales compliance risk.
financialServices.useCase3Description: Track financial, operational and risk signals of portfolio companies, generating traceable reports to support informed decisions.
financialServices.useCase4Description: Integrate regulatory documents and internal rules, enabling auditors to quickly locate compliance evidence.

legalCompliance.pageDescription: Legal & Compliance - Turn contracts and case files into defensible conclusions
legalCompliance.headerTitle: Turn contracts and case files into defensible conclusions
legalCompliance.headerSubtitle: For law firms and in-house legal teams, unify contracts, due diligence materials, and statutes or case law to produce review outcomes that are verifiable, citeable, and ready to deliver.
feature1Items: Automatically extract key terms, clauses and obligations from complex contracts for efficient review.
Identify potential risks, inconsistencies and non-compliance issues with AI-powered analysis.
Generate comparative summaries across multiple contracts with traceable source citations.
feature2Items: Aggregate relevant statutes, case law and regulatory materials for comprehensive legal research.
Cross-reference precedents and legal opinions to support due diligence conclusions.
Maintain audit trails for every citation ensuring defensible and verifiable outcomes.
legalCompliance.useCase1Description: Upload contracts for AI-powered extraction of key provisions, enabling rapid identification of risks and obligations.
legalCompliance.useCase2Description: Query case law, statutes and regulatory documents with natural language questions and receive citeable answers.
legalCompliance.useCase3Description: Organize case materials, extract relevant precedents and generate litigation briefs with full source tracing.
legalCompliance.useCase4Description: Build searchable repositories of standard clauses with versioning and usage analytics for contract drafting efficiency.

manufacturing.pageDescription: Manufacturing - Convert work orders and manuals into on-site resolution playbooks
manufacturing.headerTitle: Convert work orders and manuals into on-site resolution playbooks
manufacturing.headerSubtitle: For plant managers, equipment owners, and engineers, connect manuals, work orders, and quality reports to reduce downtime, rework, and information gaps on the shop floor.
feature1Items: Rapidly locate relevant sections across massive equipment manuals
Automatically summarize fault descriptions and repair steps
Connect historical work orders to current issues
feature2Items: Generate structured quality reports with one click
Compare test data against standards and highlight deviations
feature3Items: Simulate process flows to identify bottlenecks
Recommend optimal parameters based on historical data
Analyze root causes of quality fluctuations
feature4Items: Match incoming materials to certificates and specifications
manufacturing.useCase1Description: Connect equipment manuals, maintenance records, and operational guidelines to provide technicians with instant access to technical documentation during on-site maintenance.
manufacturing.useCase2Description: Link quality inspection reports, defect records, and root cause analyses to help quality teams quickly identify and resolve product quality issues.
manufacturing.useCase3Description: Integrate process documentation, production data, and optimization records to support manufacturing process improvement and efficiency enhancement.
manufacturing.useCase4Description: Match incoming material certificates, specifications, and supplier documentation to ensure compliance with quality standards.

education.pageDescription: Education - Build personalized courseware and learning paths
education.headerTitle: Build personalized courseware and learning paths
education.headerSubtitle: For education teams, unify courseware, question banks, and classroom content to improve lesson prep efficiency, feedback quality, and personalized learning outcomes.
feature1Items: Centralize course materials, exams, and resources
feature2Items: Understand text, images, and tables in documents
education.useCase1Description: Quickly generate lesson plans, course materials, and quizzes based on course objectives and student needs.
education.useCase2Description: Provide real-time feedback and hints on student assignments while maintaining academic integrity.
education.useCase3Description: Adapt to individual student progress and recommend optimal learning sequences and resources.
education.useCase4Description: Help students and researchers find, cite, and synthesize academic literature efficiently.
